fields.label: Data Security Certifications (e.g., ISO 27001, SOC 2 Type II)

fields.value: Host on your private cloud (implies flexibility, no explicit specific policy stated)

fields.label: Adherence to Data Privacy Regulations (e.g., India's DPDP Act, GDPR if applicable)

value.details: Full Value Technologies Private Limited (legal entity for Kelp) may use cookies; cookies will not be used to determine user identity; mentions third-party cookies (YouTube, LinkedIn, Facebook, Twitter)

Information may be transferred, stored, and processed in countries other than the user's own; measures implemented to protect personal information in accordance with privacy notice and applicable law, including European Commission's Standard Contractual Clauses for EEA/UK residents

fields.label: Regulatory Licenses Held (if any specific to FinTech data handling in India)
fields.value: No explicit mention of Kelpglobal or Full Value Technologies Private Limited holding specific FinTech data handling licenses (e.g., RBI's PA-CB, NBFC, PPI License). Full Value Technologies Private Limited has CIN: U72900MH2022PTC380614, 'Active' status as of June 4, 2026.

reasoning.pe_analyst: A strong posture in data security certifications and adherence to regulations significantly de-risks the investment, making it more likely to pursue deeper diligence.
reasoning.banker: Robust data security and compliance documentation are critical for deal execution and client trust, increasing the likelihood of pursuing a pitch.
reasoning.credit_analyst: Evidence of strong data security and disaster recovery plans mitigates operational and reputational risk, making a deeper underwriting look more favorable.
reasoning.consultant: Understanding the regulatory licenses and compliance adherence provides a clear operational framework and potential areas for efficiency improvements, warranting further investigation.

sections.heading: AI Platform Features & Data Integration

fields.label: Number of Integrated Data Sources (e.g., PitchBook, Crunchbase)

value.name: PitchBook data
value.description: Seamlessly integrated directly into Kelp's software suite, including financial data on private and public companies, investors, funds, limited partners, and service providers.

value.name: Clients' secure data sources and 365 accounts

fields.label: Types of AI Models Used (e.g., NLP, Predictive Analytics)

value.description: Used for extracting insights from data rooms, identifying key relationships and competitive pressures, and drafting data-driven memos.
Used for AI-accelerated thematic deal origination, identifying hidden opportunities, and assessing risks.

fields.label: Number of Deal Types Supported (e.g., Growth Equity, Buyout, Venture)
Average Time Saved per Deal (Client Testimonials/Case Studies)

value.metric: Reduction in research and analysis efforts

value.note: Client testimonial from Head of M&A, Global Healthcare Company.

fields.label: Number of API Integrations Offered

value.description: Kelp offers general API and developer tools.

fields.label: Proprietary Data Assets (description)
fields.value: Kelp combines PitchBook's financial and deal data with its own proprietary firmographic research, analytics, and advanced algorithms. Its technology leverages structured and unstructured data, emphasizing the increasing value of proprietary data and unique analytical approaches.
